contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: truesight_autopilot — sophia HSTS + self-deploy hardening (PRs #75 + #76 + #77)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/75
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/76
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/77
  
  Details:
  Two questions from Gary, both shipped:
  
  1. 'How do we ensure the deploy script ran is always the latest?' → Self-deploy hit an in-memory caching bug when fixes to the deploy flow itself didn't take effect until the NEXT invocation (because Python imports deploy.py once at module load).
  
     PR #76 fixes this with a two-phase re-exec pattern: phase-one (parent) does git pull then spawns a fresh Python subprocess with env-var sentinel AUTOPILOT_DEPLOY_PHASE=phase_two_post_pull. Child re-imports deploy.py from disk (now containing whatever the pull brought in), runs pip install + restart + nginx, returns JSON to parent stdout. Parent stays alive so /chat callers get the response cleanly.
  
     Subsequent self-deploy then surfaced PR #77 — certbot --nginx edits /etc/nginx/sites-available/sophia which is symlinked into the repo, so the next git pull refuses to merge the dirty state. Fix: replace git pull with git fetch + reset --hard origin/main + clean -fd (matching scripts/deploy.sh).
  
  2. 'How do we get sophia behind https without the Not secure error?' → TLS itself was correct (valid Let's Encrypt cert, working 80→443 redirect), but HSTS header was missing so browsers tried http:// first on every visit, briefly showing 'Not secure'.
  
     PR #75 adds Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload to sophia.conf. After first HTTPS visit, browsers cache the HSTS rule for 2 years and skip the http:// hop entirely.
  
  Validated end-to-end:
  - Self-deploy returned status=success, 4 steps OK, in 15.0s on a dirty repo state
  - curl -sI https://sophia.truesight.me/health returns: Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload
  - Prod HEAD at eb30777 (#77 squash)
  - Both systemd units active, /health=ok
  
  The self-deploy is now robust against (a) in-memory caching of deploy-tool fixes [#76], (b) external tooling mutating repo files like certbot [#77], (c) the prior nginx-config bugs [#74], and (d) browser security UI complaints [#75].
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
